series_description: A form used to identify the length of time a record must be retained before final disposition.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded by a revised retention schedule, or until record series is no longer maintained ; Electronic: Retain until superseded by a revised retention schedule, or until record series is no longer maintained

series_description: Questionnaires completed by potential expert witnesses pertaining to the potential expert witness' credentials, hospital privileges, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Quarterly Report of Disposed and Pending Complaint
series_description: Required by R.C. 4731.22(F)(6), the report documents the disposition of all cases during the preceding three months, and contains the following information for each case for which the Board has completed its activities; the case number assigned to the complaint; the type of certificate to practice, if any, held by the object of the complaint; a description of the allegations contained in the complaint; and the disposition of the case. The report also contains the number of pending cases. Finally, the report must protect the identity of the object of the complaint and is a public record pursuant to R.C. 149.43.
retention_statement: Electronic: LAN: Retain for one year and as long as administratively useful

series_description: Filings are required under Chapter 1347 of the Revised Code.
retention_statement: Microform: Retain until superceded, obsolete, or replaced ; Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Confidential documents, including verified patient records, and physical evidence obtained from outside sources and collected by the Board during the course of an investigation.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper: Retain 7 years after the complaint being investigated is closed; but if evidence is admitted in an administrative hearing

series_description: Includes mailing lists and other lists, directories, rosters and registers compiled by the Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Documents or spreadsheets which indicate the status of on-going projects and/or advise supervisors of various events and issues, such as work logs, investigator's daily reports, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Consumer Information Produced by the Board
series_description: Includes documents such as "Understanding the State Medical Board Hearing Process"; "Consumer Guide"; etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Agreements with persons or entities for the exchange of confidential information or services.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper: Retain until scanned to LAN and LAN checked for accuracy; and for two years after the term of contract has expired; ; Electronic: LAN: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Minutes of Board Committee Meetings, w/ Attachment
series_description: Minutes of from Board committee meetings, which may include the following: Executive Committee; Impairment Committee; Legislative Liaison & Rules Committee; Education; Public Relations & Risk Management Committee; Consent Agreement Committee; Pain Management Committee; Prescribing Committee; Quality Assurance Committee; Disciplinary Policies & Guidelines Committee; Minimal Standards Committee; Limited Branch & Alternative Medicine Committee; Scope of Practice Committee; Physician Assistant Committee; and Physician Assistant Policy Committee.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper: Retain until minutes are approved by the appropriate committee and signed by the committee chairperson; and until the minutes are scanned to the LAN [Journal], and the scan is reviewed for accuracy and completeness, review by State Archives ; Electronic: Audiotapes and Other Electronic [Digital recording]: Retain until minutes are transcribed and reviewed for accuracy and completeness, and until transferred to LAN and LAN checked for accuracy;

series_description: Affirmative action plans required by the Equal Employment Opportunity Division.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper: Retain 2 years, and ; Electronic: LAN: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Records relating to labor relations.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after case is closed

series_title: Probationer Conferences: Audiotapes and Digital Recordings
series_description: Probationer Conferences: Audiotapes and Digital Recordings
retention_statement: Electronic: Other Electronic [Digital Recordiings and audiotapes]: Retain until information transferred to LAN;

series_description: Periodic surveys on operational issues requested by outside agencies such as the Federation of State Medical Boards, the AMA, other state licensing boards, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Ethics Commission R.C. 102.04 (D) Statement
retention_statement: Paper: Paper: Original filed with the Ethics Commission. Retain one paper copy until scanned to LAN and LAN checked for accuracy ; Electronic: LAN: Retain until the employee separates from the Board

series_description: Documents pertaining to Board Meetings and related exhibits, including an outline of the agenda; journal entries; administrative and rules hearings reports & recommendations and final orders; approved notices of opportunity for hearing; signed consent agreements; minutes of Board committee meetings with hand-out materials, Board meeting guest lists; the monthly administrative report to the Board [which may include, but is not limited to: the Monthly Fiscal Report, List of Presentations, List of Continuing Education of Staff Training, Licensure Statistics Sheet, Records, Hearing Unit Administrative Report, Website Volume Statistics, etc.]; and exhibits from Board meetings [if noted in the minutes that the exhibit will be included in the Journal].
retention_statement: Paper: Paper: Retain until scanned to LAN and CD-ROM and until the LAN and CD-ROM are checked for accuracy ; Electronic: LAN: Retain permanently. CD-ROM: Retain permanently, as backup to LAN

series_title: Minutes of Board Meetings, with Attachements
series_description: Minutes and exhibits relating to official Board meetings.
retention_statement: Paper: Audiotapes: Retain until minutes are transcribed and reviewed for accuracy and completeness

series_description: Outline of topics to be addressed at Board Meetings with related materials, including (1) an outline of the agenda: (2) information regarding discussion topics, such as: agendas of Board committee meetings; copies of licensure applications; copies of proposed consent agreements with related materials; copies of proposed notices of opportunity for hearing with related materials; blank final orders and jusdgement entries; examination results; ADA requests, etc., and (3) copies of documents which are distributed to the Board members during the meeting, such as executive reports, legislative reports, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: LAN: Retain 10 years and until no longer of administrative value; ; Paper: Retain until scanned to LAN and CD-ROM and the LAN and CD-ROM are checked for accuracy. In addition, retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Agenda of Board Meeting: Public Copy for Pre-Meet
series_description: Outline of topics to be addressed at Board Meetings, with related materials [see retention schedule for Agenda of Board Meeting, EXE-0002], but excluding not yet approved, thus confidential, notices of opportunity for hearing, consent agreements, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until related Board meeting concluded ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: May include worksheets and information used to draft legislation and rules, documents related to JCARR proceedings, committee meetings, transcripts of public hearings, lists of interested parties, contact persons, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Annual inventory report, includes release for abandoned property, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: LAN: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved; and until no longer of administrative value; ; Paper: Paper: One copy to State Inventory;

series_title: Agendas of Board Committees Meetings; with Attachments
series_description: Agendas for meetings of an Board Committees, including Ad Hoc Committees & Advisory Councils
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to LAN and CD-ROM and the LAN and CD-ROM are checked for accuracy. In addition, retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: LAN: Retain as part of the related Board Meeting Agenda [for 10 years and until no longer of administrative vale;

series_description: Complaint processing protocols.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper: Retain one copy until superseded, obsolete or replaced; and until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved; ; Electronic: LAN: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, and until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Documentation of supplies and merchandise received.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Joint Legislative and Ethics Commission Statements
series_description: Documents which by statute must be filed periodically with the Joint Legislative and Ethics Commission.
retention_statement: Electronic: LAN: Retain until the employee separtates from the Board ; Paper: Paper: Original filed with the Joint Legislative and Ethics Commission. Retain one paper copy until scanned to LAN and LAN checked for accuracy

series_description: Employee training videotapes, audiotapes, Power Point presentations, interactive CD-ROMs, and other materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Survey of Board operations, including fees, licensure, funding, etc., updated biannually.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until an updated (bi-annual) Federation Exchange is published

series_description: Employee payroll records, including payroll journals, payroll register, board member per diem forms, and related payroll documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable period has been audited by Auditor of state, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_description: Vacancy posting and applications, resumes, civil service applications, and interview questions from applicants.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after position filled or decision not to fill the position is made

series_description: Including, but not limited to: information relating to the employee''s work schedule, vacation or leave, current active disciplinary track items, last performance review, items regarding performance observations or the times that are current since the last review and which will be used to prepare the next review, positive and negative comments.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Investigation of Employee [Internal]; No Action Taken
series_description: Files relating to investigation of an employee when investigation did not lead to action taken against the employee.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: This record file contains Enforcement files involving confidential information, including complaints and supplemental materials filed with the Board pursuant to R.C. Chapters 4730, 4731, 4760 and 4762, 4774, and 4778; documents relating to the processing of complaints; information relating to investigations, including reports of investigations, correspondence and memoranda, subpoenas and related documents, orders to evaluation, consent agreements, notices of opportunity for hearing, cautionary letters, skills or knowledge tests completed by licensees; federal databank reports; Prosecutor Reporting Forms pursuant to R.C. 4731.223; and documents pertaining to an injunction against unauthorized practice pursuant to R.C. 4731.341; denial of applications for licensees on probation following disciplinary action.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 75 years. ; Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic database and checked for accuracy within 90 days

series_description: Spreadsheet list of all agency smart phones, computers, and monitors assigned to an employee/ room.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, and until no longer of administrative value or 3 years ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, and until no longer of administrative value or 3 years

series_description: Formal opinions issued to the Medical Board with all pertinent materials attached thereto.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronic version for 3 years ; Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy or 3 years;

series_description: Documents setting forth the official Board position on particular issues.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy or 3 years; ; Electronic: Retain electronic version for 25 years

series_description: Letters from the Board or Board Staff expressing opinions in response to questions which pertain to significant Board-related issues.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronic version permanently ; Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy;

series_description: Correspondence and other documentation received by the Board after a rule has been adopted; to be used for rule review, mandated by statute to occur every five years.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Retain electronic version for 5 years and until no longer of administrative value;

series_description: Administrative rules as sent to JCARR, adopted rules, related materials such as lists of persons to whom letters and/or electronic mail messages have been sent, copies of the letters sent, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Retain electronic version permanently.

series_description: Contain information pertaining to limited branch school, including applications, curriculm information, documents of approval, correspondence, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 75 years after the school ceases to be in existence. ; Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy;

series_description: Certificates of licensure intended to be displayed on wall, but which are misprinted by the computer and returned to the Board by the licensee.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ;

series_description: Answer Sheets for licensure examinations developed and produced by the Medical Board, and administered to limited branch applicants. Pool of questions from which limited branch examinations are created. Licensure examination booklets developed and produced by the Board, and administered to limited branch applicants. Grade reports and psychometrics pertaining to the limited branch examinations which are prepared at the Ohio State University.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Retain for five years after date of examination, if not subject to litigation; if subject to litigation, retain for three years after litigation and related appeals have terminated, or for five years, whichever is longer

series_description: Renewal application cards submitted by persons seeking to have a supervision agreement renewed, and form letters, if any, pertaining to the renewal application questions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Retain for 10 years after the utilization plan is no longer active.

series_description: Original applications forms for applications that resulted in the issuance of a certificate or a license; includes initial applications, restoration/reinstatement applications, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Retain permanently.

series_title: Applications, Renewal Card: Completed and Returned
series_description: Renewal application cards and applications submitted by persons seeking to have a license or certificate renewed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Retain for 75 years.

series_description: Information pertaining to the random audit of continuing education, and may include correspondence, certified mail receipts, licensee's logs of continuing education, supporting documentation, etdc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years following the end of the year in which the licensee achieves compliance with all audit requirements.

series_description: Documents pertaining to the transport of documents stored in off-site storage, and receipts for documents removed from and returned to off-site storage, lists of box numbers and contents, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value or 3 years

series_description: Official register of all licensees pursuant to R.C. 4731.07, documented in books prior to 1982. [NOTE: since 1982 the register of licensees is contained in the MD Mast Database. See GEN-0007.]
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Retain permanently

series_title: Waivers of Continuing Medical Education Requirements
series_description: Request for waiver of CME requirements; copies of cover letters, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years following the end of the renewal period to which the waiver request applied.

series_description: Policy and procedure manuals for each section, including but not limited to procedures for managing the section, sample letters, supporting documents, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy, review by State Archivist ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_title: Board Member Contunuing Professional Development Files
series_description: Includes retreat information, federation activities, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy ; Electronic: Retain for ten years after Board member separates from the Board.

series_description: Curricula vitae for Board members
retention_statement: Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy ; Electronic: LAN: Retain permanently

series_description: Overview of the Board''s functions, including the mission statement, relevant statutes and rules, position papers, meeting schedules, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy

series_description: Including the initial letter from the Inspector General advising the Board that a complaint has been filed; a copy of the Board's response; letters of closure; copies of reports of investigation by the Inspector General, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 10 years after resolution of the complaint filed with the Inspector General, and as long as administratively necessary; ; Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy

series_description: Report issued after agency audit by the Auditor of State. (Note: Original retained by Auditor of State)
retention_statement: Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_title: Bank Deposit Slips, Ledgers, Bank Statements, Cancelled Checks and Related Documents
series_description: Bank account maintained for petty cash.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_description: Contracts with expert witnesses and other service venders doing business with the state.
retention_statement: Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy ; Electronic: Retain until term of contract is expired, and until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_description: Budget proposal submitted to the Office of Budget and Management for the next fiscal biennium.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved,retain until no longer of administrative value ; Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy

series_description: Miscellaneous expense reports, other than travel expense reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: On-line form used to move money from one SAC to another
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_title: Monthly Fiscal Reports to Board Members
series_description: Part of Annual Report
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until information is transferred to the Annual Report; until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved; and until no longer of administrative value ; Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy

series_title: Civil Rights and Title VII Files
series_description: Contains complaints and hearing information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 7 years and until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Paper: Retain 7 years and until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved.

series_description: Position descriptions and other documents relating to each position.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until applicable period has been audited by Auditor of state, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved; ; Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy

series_title: Employee FMLA,EAP, Disability and Workers Compensation
series_description: Employee medical records relating to injury or illness.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 7 years after employe separation ; Paper: Retain 7 years after employe separation

series_description: Includes worksheets used for proposed budgets, legislative testimony, and related documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_description: Records regarding revenue, including deposits to Treasurer of State, cash receipts, refunds of expenditures, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_description: Request for change in appropriation authority, fees, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_description: Used for claiming reimbursement of in-state and out of state travel.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_description: Balance sheet for monthly transactions.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved; ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_description: Including, but not limited to: documents pertaining to application forms, personnel actions, benefit forms, training records, workforce development, tuition rembursement, other education assistance program records, and copies/or originals of other documents concerning the employee [excluding medical records].
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 7 years after employee leaves employment. ; Paper: Retain 7 years after employee leaves employment.

series_title: Monthly Board Meeting Livestream Video Recording
series_description: Monthly livestream video recording of Board meeting on Board YouTube Channel
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value
